news.news: Immunocore presented updated Phase 1 data for brenetafusp, a PRAME-targeted ImmTAC bispecific antibody, at the 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting. The data showed an 87% 6-month overall survival rate in heavily pretreated melanoma patients, supporting the selection of a 160 mcg dose for the ongoing Phase 3 PRISM-MEL-301 trial.
